purpose: This repository contains Infrastructure as Code (IaC) for the Cross River Bank's lending and selling platform. It manages AWS cloud resources using Terragrunt and Terraform to provision and configure databases, APIs, messaging services, and orchestration components across multiple environments.

dataEntities.name: Loan
dataEntities.description: Core lending entity with funding information

dataEntities.name: ExportedData
dataEntities.description: Data exported from the system for external consumption

messagingPatterns.name: SQS Queues
messagingPatterns.description: Message queues for selling platform operations

findings.title: Hardcoded database permissions in rotation scripts
findings.description: Database permissions are hardcoded in rotation scripts rather than being configurable, which could lead to privilege escalation or excessive permissions. Consider moving these to environment variables or configuration files.

findings.title: Secret rotation logic duplication
findings.description: Secret rotation logic is duplicated across multiple Lambda functions with only slight differences. This creates maintenance issues and increases the risk of security vulnerabilities. Extract common code into a shared library.
